title: The New Order: World Collided | Cyborg
description: This is a custom origin that was put into The New Order
body: This mod is a add-on to the Origins mod. this was made and created by me solely, I made this for The New Order: Worlds Collided modpack and now it can be added to your own modpacks and worlds. this mod add the origin Cyborg where you gain the abilities as wells as the de-buffs of being a machine for example you have the ability to throw people but because of your circuits you get poisoned whilst in water
